title: Daily Summary — 2026-04-30
body:
## Recent Activity

Synced window: 2026-04-29T12:08:44Z to 2026-04-30T12:08:44Z. Signals show 27 issues, 22 PRs, 1 discussion, and 0 commits updated.

Activity centered on orchestrator follow-up work, first-run onboarding, daily summary/discussion gating, project-management automation, rubrics cleanup, and stacked PR support.

## Recently Active PRs

- Open: [#60 Collapse old orchestrator handoff comments](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/60), [#61 Support child orchestrator lane handoffs](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/61), and [#62 Add first-run onboarding setup workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62) were created from orchestrated implementations and remain active.
- Still open from earlier synced work: [#45 Handle closed PR follow-up orchestration](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/45) and [#15 Add minimal add-rubrics route with dedicated workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/15).

- [#23 Agent should create tags upon install/first run](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/23) drove [#62](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/62) and remains open.
- [#26 Automatically report issues on GitHub](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/26) continued design discussion; latest direction favors GitHub Discussions bug-report intake with promotion to Issues when actionable.
